subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! The Wronged One hath remembered thee when sorrows encompassed Him by reason of what befell Him from those who denied God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین قد ذکرک المظلوم اذ احاطته الاحزان بما ورد علیه من الذین کفروا بالله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital
